decisions.briefing: Both NASDAQ and S&P 500 gained just 0.1% today — a directionless, neutral session with no clear catalyst to drive momentum in either direction. Cash sits at $477.14, just below the $500 threshold that would trigger new position entries, so I'm holding the current six positions rather than forcing a trade. The portfolio is up 31.6% overall and the existing holdings remain intact with no stop-loss or profit-target triggers visible from available data.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equity markets drifted marginally higher on June 17, 2026, with both the NASDAQ and S&P 500 posting slim 0.1% gains in a low-conviction session. Trading volumes were subdued as investors appeared to be in a holding pattern, awaiting fresh economic data or Federal Reserve commentary to establish a clearer directional bias. With no major headline-driving events, most sectors consolidated recent gains rather than breaking out in either direction.
market_education.summary_zh: 2026年6月17日，美國股市小幅收高，納斯達克指數與標普500指數均上漲0.1%，整體走勢缺乏明確方向。交易量低迷，投資者普遍持觀望態度，靜待新的經濟數據或聯儲局表態，以確立更清晰的市場趨勢。在缺乏重大利好或利空消息的情況下，各板塊基本維持近期漲幅，並未出現明顯突破。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash management in a trading portfolio means deliberately deciding how much dry powder to keep versus deploy. Too little cash leaves no room to act on new opportunities; too much means missed gains sitting idle. Here, cash at $477 — just $23 below the deployment threshold — illustrates a deliberate rule: don't force a trade when the sizing math barely clears the bar.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 投資組合中的現金管理，是指有意識地決定保留多少備用資金、以及何時部署資金入市。現金太少，新機會來臨時無從把握；現金太多，則白白錯失潛在收益。本投資組合現金為477美元，僅差23美元達到部署門檻，這正體現了一條重要原則：若資金規模勉強達標，寧可按兵不動，也不要為了交易而交易。
